name: Space Mercenary Shooter : Episode 1
short_description: Space Mercenary Shooter is an episodic indie FPS inspired by early shooter games. Featuring hand crafted levels and a fully voice acted cast of characters.
detailed_description:
Space Mercenary Shooter is an episodic indie FPS inspired by early shooter games. Featuring hand crafted levels and a fully voice acted cast of characters.


The first episode features our main protagonist boarding the infamous "Enforcer" in an attempt to blow it out of orbit.


MAIN CAMPAIGN
Featuring a campaign taking place in a high tech Sci-Fi world. Fight your way through multiple levels in this action filled adventure.

FAST PACED ACTION
Classic FPS weapons with a Sci-Fi twist. Keep moving to stay alive and survive the onslaught of space mercs!

FULLY VOICE ACTED
Space Mercenary Shooter features a fully voiced cast of side characters and enemies..
